description: Dynatrace automatically detects service related performance anomalies such as response time degradations and failure rate increases.
documentation:
Use these settings to configure detection sensitivity, set alert thresholds, or disable alerting for certain services. Read more about [Automated multi-dimensional baselining](https://dt-url.net/5r5p0pnz/ "Visit Dynatrace support center").

To avoid false-positive problem notifications, automated anomaly detection is only available for applications and services that have run for at least 20% of a week (7 days).

loadSpikePercent.displayName: Alert if the observed load is more than this percentage of the expected value

loadDropPercent.displayName: Alert if the observed load is less than this percentage of the expected value

requestsPerMinute.displayName: Only alert if there are at least

minutesAbnormalState.displayName: Only alert if the abnormal state remains for at least

detectionMode.displayName: Detection mode for increases in failure rate

autoDetection.description: Alert if the percentage of failing service calls increases by **both** the absolute and relative thresholds:

fixedDetection.description: Alert if a given failure rate is exceeded during any 5-minute-period

responseTimeAll.description: Alert if the median response time of all requests degrades beyond **both** the absolute and relative thresholds:

responseTimeSlowest.description: Alert if the response time of the slowest 10% of requests degrades beyond **both** the absolute and relative thresholds:

degradationMilliseconds.displayName: Alert if the response time degrades beyond this many ms within an observation period of 5 minutes

slowestDegradationMilliseconds.displayName: Alert if the response time of the slowest 10% degrades beyond this many ms within an observation period of 5 minutes

responseTimeAll.description: Alert if the median response time of all requests degrades beyond this threshold:

responseTimeSlowest.description: Alert if the response time of the slowest 10% of requests degrades beyond this threshold:

detectionMode.displayName: Detection mode for response time degradations

loadDrops.description: Alert if the observed load is lower than the expected load by a specified margin for a specified amount of time:
loadDrops.documentation: Dynatrace learns your typical service load over an observation period of one week.

loadSpikes.description: Alert if the observed load exceeds the expected load by a specified margin for a specified amount of time:
loadSpikes.documentation: Dynatrace learns your typical service load over an observation period of one week.
